heading: Establishment of senior level positions
label: 613 Establishment of senior level positions
notes: References in TextLevel II of the Executive Schedule, referred to in subsec. (b), is set out in , Government Organization and Employees.section 5313 of Title 5

CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 2017, which is div. I of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2017, and not as part of title II of the Congressional Budget and Impoundment Control Act of 1974 which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Notwithstanding the fourth sentence of , the Director of the Congressional Budget Office may establish and fix the compensation of senior level positions in the Congressional Budget Office to meet critical scientific, technical, professional, or executive needs of the Office.section 601(b) of this title

children.heading: Limitation on compensation
children.label: b Limitation on compensation
children.text: The annual rate of pay for any position established under this section may not exceed the annual rate of pay for level II of the Executive Schedule.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: c Effective date
children.text: This section shall apply with respect to fiscal year 2017 and each succeeding fiscal year.
